description: Repeatable prompts for comparing GitHub Copilot context, model, and agent workflow token usage.

prompts.name: Broad repository summary
prompts.prompt: Summarize how this repository works and suggest how to modernize the event-driven platform slice. Do not modify files.

prompts.name: Scoped file discovery
prompts.prompt: Find the smallest set of files I should give Copilot to understand the event-driven add-on flow. Do not summarize the whole repo; return only file paths and why each matters. Do not modify files.

prompts.name: Concise scoped plan
prompts.prompt: Using only AGENTS.md, PRD.md, README.md, specs\platform\ARCHITECTURE.md, and specs\trip\ARCHITECTURE.md, create a concise implementation plan for the event-driven add-on flow. Keep the output under 20 lines and include validation steps. Do not modify files.

prompts.name: Compact handoff summary
prompts.prompt: Create a handoff summary for implementing an event-driven add-on flow. Keep only decisions, relevant files, constraints, and validation steps. Do not modify files.
